resources.string: FujiNet Go 800 OSS is the open source Atari FujiNet emulation experience for Android. FujiNet Go 800 OSS is powered by the atari800 emulator and FujiNet-PC. Visit the FujiNet project site for documentation, news, and community resources.
Balance FujiNet Go 800 OSS audio against podcasts and other apps.
Pause the emulator when FujiNet Go 800 OSS loses foreground focus, then resume when you return.
